criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Ease of setup and configuration to ensure rapid adoption by the 150-person team.

criteria.label: Integration Strength
criteria.description: Ability to connect with existing consultancy tools via robust APIs.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Comprehensive view of subscription fees, onboarding costs, and long-term maintenance.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Strict adherence to EU data protection regulations and Art. 28 requirements.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Guarantee that all customer data is stored and processed within the EU.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Financial health and operational longevity of the provider.

criteria.label: Sustainability Credentials
criteria.description: Alignment with the consultancy's mission, including carbon footprint and ESG reporting.

criteria.label: Strategic Fit
criteria.description: Alignment with the long-term growth and operational needs of a sustainability consultancy.
